ham.subject: Out of Office: Jane Doe – June 15 to June 22
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from June 15 to June 22, returning on June 23. During this period, I will have limited access to email and will not be able to respond promptly.

For urgent matters, please contact my colleague John Smith at john.smith@example.com or call the office line at (555) 123-4567.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Jane Doe

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Zoom Meeting Invitation
spam.body:
Dear Valued Partner,

We have detected unusual activity on your account that requires immediate attention. To protect your financial interests and comply with our updated security protocols, you must confirm your account details and join a mandatory Zoom briefing.

Please click the link below to join the secure session:
<URL>

During the call, you will receive instructions on how to secure your account and avoid potential financial penalties. Failure to attend may result in temporary suspension of your account and loss of access to critical services.

Act now – the deadline to complete verification is 24 hours from receipt of this email.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
Security Operations Team
